products.name: X9 4X4 Dump Truck
products.description: 4x4, All wheel drive, Leaf-springs suspension, main and sub-springs structure, strong bearing capacity, simple structure, low maintenance cost. The front and rear suspensions are strictly matched, supplemented by front and rear dampers to ensure loading capacity and improve comfort. Extra-long service intervals for engine, gearbox and rear axle, halving the number of pit stops.

products.name: X9 Tow Truck
products.description: Maximum gradient of over 30%, easy to cope with the tough working conditions. Reliable recovery vehicle equipped with heavy-duty winch and towing platform. Essential for roadside assistance and disabled vehicle transport operations.

products.name: X7 Flatbed Truck
products.description: Semi-floating cab + main driver's airbag shock-absorbing seat reduces driving fatigue and improves driving comfort. The instrumentation adopts the design of pointer plus LCD display, which can read the vehicle driving data directly and clearly.

products.name: 9 Series Sweeper
products.description: Efficient street sweeper with high-capacity debris collection system. Designed for urban road maintenance with powerful sweeping and dust suppression capabilities. Smart sanitation solution for modern cities.

products.name: X9 Aerial Work Platform
products.description: The truck has strong stability, convenient operation, flexible mobility, and is suitable for places with a wide range of work surfaces. Adopting multi-level telescopic arms, with a large operating range and fast lifting speed. Using high-strength materials and high-precision technology, the cab is equipped with multiple safety protection systems.

products.name: X6 Dropside Truck
products.description: Minimum ground clearance 314mm, approach angle greater than 25 degrees. Configured with airbag shock-absorbing main seat, the widest part of the lower sleeper reaches 85 cm. Highly efficient optimization of the new transmission system + maintenance-free high-efficiency drive axles + special low-rolling resistance tires, result in lower fuel consumption for the whole vehicle.

products.name: X6 AWD Cargo Truck
products.description: 4x4 All wheel drive cargo truck offering superior off-road capability. Equipped with powerful engine and robust chassis for challenging terrain and remote area logistics. Excellent traction and maneuverability in all conditions.

products.name: X6 Cement Mixer Truck
products.description: Flexible, Lightweight and Powerful. Short wheelbase design chassis, can be equipped with shortened axle, with smaller turning radius. Modular weight reduction design, aluminum alloy, high-strength profiles. Efficient drum mixing technology ensures consistent concrete quality.

products.name: X6 Sprinkler Truck
products.description: Lightweight design chassis, frame beam, suspension. Beautiful and practical M3000 cab, with a sedan-like interior. Ideal for dust suppression, road cleaning, and urban greening applications.

products.name: X7 Concrete Mixer Truck
products.description: High strength wear-resistant steel, reliable hydraulic system. Reinforced multi-leaf springs, high strength and rigidity double-layer chassis, easy to cope with complex working conditions. Main Rear View Mirror + Supplemental Blind Mirror to reduce the driver's visual blind spot.

products.name: E1st Tractor
products.description: Cummins engine+Eaton AMT gearbox, Hande maintenance-free axle integrated exclusive power chain design, with a maximum output of 560 horsepower. Brand-new cab modeling design, optimization technology of vehicle external flow field (CFD), smooth adjustment of top air deflector, achieving optimal main+trailer matching, whole vehicle drag coefficient significantly reduced. The cab adopts the design concept of intelligent seat, with a flat floor design and an internal height of 2m 13, which provides ample space for drivers and passengers.

products.name: Z3 Tractor Truck
products.description: The new powertrain, intelligent electronic system and driving environment provide customers with efficient, fast, and clean logistics experience. The high-strength cab design complies with the latest European safety standards and provides strong protection for driver and passengers. The flat-floor design and spacious interior make it possible to stand and walk in the cab without any obstacles.

products.name: X3s Trailer Truck
products.description: Versatile heavy duty tractor with excellent power-to-weight ratio. Ideal for regional and inter-city transport with balanced performance, reliability, and operating economy. Cab strength meets the latest European ECER29-03 collision standard.

products.name: E3 Tractor Truck
products.description: Equipped with dual warning system to ensure driving safety. Efficient power chain, excellent chassis configuration for better operation. The width of the berth reaches 850mm, and the distance between the upper and lower berths is 800mm for more comfortable rest.

products.name: X3s Mixer Truck 8x4
products.description: Heavy-duty concrete mixer truck with large drum capacity and reliable hydraulic system. Built for continuous operation on major construction sites with minimal downtime. 8x4 configuration provides maximum stability and payload capacity.

products.name: X9 Aerial Work Platform
products.description: The truck has strong stability, convenient operation, flexible mobility, and is suitable for places with a wide range of work surfaces. Adopting multi-level telescopic arms, with a large operating range and fast lifting speed. Using high-strength materials and high-precision technology, the cab is equipped with multiple safety protection systems.

products.name: X7 Concrete Mixer Truck
products.spec: High Strength Steel | Reliable Hydraulic System
products.description: High strength wear-resistant steel, reliable hydraulic system. Reinforced multi-leaf springs, high strength and rigidity double-layer chassis, easy to cope with complex working conditions. Main Rear View Mirror + Supplemental Blind Mirror to reduce the driver's visual blind spot.

products.name: X9 Tow Truck
products.description: Reliable recovery vehicle equipped with heavy-duty winch and towing platform. Essential for roadside assistance and disabled vehicle transport operations. Maximum gradient capability ensures performance in challenging conditions.

products.name: 9 Series Off-road
products.description: 9 Series represents durability, high performance, and high load-bearing capacity. Multiple cabs are available for selection. Convenient to adapt to all kinds of fuel tankers, sprinklers, dump trucks. Adopting 850 wide-chassis structure, stable performance and adaptable to poor road conditions.

products.name: 7 Series Off-road
products.description: 7 Series features powerful engine and excellent maneuverability. Reinforced oil pan protection grill. Double-layer frame design. Specialized rear suspension for mining, flattening load increased from 25.3T to 30.5T. The exhaust tailpipe is designed to be directionally adjustable, effectively avoiding downward exhaust blowing up dust.

products.name: 6 Series Off-road
products.description: 6 Series delivers Strong Power and Efficient Transportation. Reinforced Design with Iron bumper. Customized Upper-body configurations available. Proven platform for challenging off-road and mining operations with maximum reliability.

products.name: i9 Electric Truck
products.description: Integrated electric drive axle, highly integrated structure, higher efficiency, increased in range. Working range of 430km, support 120KW fast charging technology, 65 minutes to achieve fully charging. Brake energy recovery technology, which reduces energy consumption by approximately 15%. Zero-emission solution for sustainable urban logistics.

products.name: i9 Lite EV
products.description: Compact electric vehicle designed for urban micro-logistics. Tight turning radius, agile maneuverability, and whisper-quiet operation make it perfect for city centers and residential areas. Cost-effective zero-emission solution for last-mile delivery.

products.name: i5 Compressor Car
products.description: Electric-powered compressor vehicle designed for specialized urban applications. Combines zero-emission operation with professional-grade equipment integration for municipal and utility services.
